no: Adds 9 IWD2 subraces. HARD CONFLICT with Talents of Faerun cn:20000 (which adds 20+ subraces including all of these plus genasi). Choose one or the other. ToF is more comprehensive and integrates with its other systems. Assigns subraces to companions (Viconia=Drow, Haer'Dalis=Tiefling, Caelar=Aasimar, Baeloth=Drow).

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

conflicts.reason: Subrace Mod has FORBID_COMPONENT for many Talents of Faerun components (40310, 55100-55300, etc). Also forbids Spell Revisions #0. One-directional: ToF does not check for Subrace.
Reverse of LCC-docs incompatibility (lcc id 999 vs 1011)

sum: Subrace mod for Enhanced Edition games.

co.n: Subrace Colors: Change hair and skin
co.scn: Subrace mod for Baldur's Gate Enhanced Edition (BG1, BG:SoD, BG2, EET)
co.no: Subrace selection with hair/skin color changes. Incompatible with ToF cn:20000 — both rewrite the race selection UI.

co.tp2n: No change subrace colors (Hair and Skin)
co.scn: Subrace mod for Baldur's Gate Enhanced Edition (BG1, BG:SoD, BG2, EET)

advisories.reason: Both modify racial features. Subrace drow changes may conflict with jtweaks drow MR overhaul
